Office guide intro body: Office turns your agent workspace into a pixel office. Characters and furniture mirror real sessions, tools, memory, and schedules.
Office guide hint: Tap any character or furniture to open the related feature.
Office guide role boss body: You. This desk reflects your own activity in the workspace.
Office guide role assistant body: Your main chat and DM sessions. When the main conversation is busy, the secretary starts typing.
Office guide role workers body: Sub-agents, cron jobs, and channel workers sit in the team area.
Office guide role activity body: Typing, bright screens, busy movement, and badges mean recent activity or items that need attention.
Office guide furniture bookshelf body: Skills. Open the skill list and related capability pages.
Office guide furniture calendar body: Schedules and cron jobs. Use it to inspect jobs and failures.
Office guide furniture cabinet body: Memory. Open the file list behind the filing cabinet.
Office guide furniture whiteboard body: Usage and status. The whiteboard shows today's workspace stats.
Office guide furniture connections body: Connections and devices. Use these to manage channel connections, pair requests, and nodes.
Office guide furniture toolbox body: Tools. Open the available tool pages from the toolbox.
